title: The Prop Drilling Problem
description: Understand why passing props through many levels is painful.

slides.title: Prop Drilling 🕳️

quizData.question: What is prop drilling?

options.text: Using props to drill down into data structures
Passing props through many layers of components that don't need them
Creating holes in components for props

quizData.explanation: Prop drilling is the process of passing data through intermediate components just to reach a deeply nested child.
